storyBeat: 小貓在巷子裡醒來。雨下得很大,身上都濕了。
sentence: The kitten wakes up. It is raining ___.
explanationZh: raining hard 是「下大雨」的固定用法。hardly 意思是「幾乎不」,跟「用力」沒關係。

storyBeat: 牠的毛全濕了,風吹過來好冷。
sentence: My fur is wet. I feel very ___.
explanationZh: 濕掉的毛 + 風 = 冷 (cold)。warm 是溫暖,dry 是乾的,都不符合情境。

storyBeat: 肚子咕咕叫,昨天都沒吃東西。
sentence: I have not eaten since yesterday. I am so ___.
explanationZh: 沒吃東西就是 hungry (餓)。thirsty 是「渴」,跟沒喝水有關。

storyBeat: 一個大人影靠近,小貓嚇得縮起來。
sentence: A big shadow comes close. The kitten is ___.
explanationZh: 陌生人影靠近 → 害怕 (scared)。brave 是勇敢,情境相反。

storyBeat: 原來是一位撐藍傘的阿嬤。她笑了笑。
sentence: It is a grandma with a blue umbrella. She has a ___ face.
explanationZh: 看到笑容 → kind (友善的) 臉。angry / sad / busy 都跟笑相反。

storyBeat: 阿嬤把傘往小貓那邊傾過來,擋住雨。
sentence: The grandma ___ her umbrella over me.
explanationZh: 把傘撐在某物上面 → hold (拿、撐著)。throw 是丟,drop 是掉落。

storyBeat: 小貓躲在麵包店後門。一股香味飄出來。
sentence: I smell something ___ from the bakery.
explanationZh: 麵包店的香味通常是「甜」(sweet)。loud 是大聲,跟氣味無關。

storyBeat: 麵包店老闆走出來,手上拿著一塊麵包。
sentence: The baker holds a piece of ___ in his hand.
explanationZh: 麵包店 (bakery) 的老闆手上拿的當然是 bread (麵包)。

storyBeat: 他在麵包上塗了一點奶油。
sentence: He puts some ___ on the bread.
explanationZh: 塗在麵包上的東西最常見的是 butter (奶油)。

storyBeat: 他把麵包剝成小塊,輕輕放在地上。
sentence: He breaks the bread into small pieces and ___ them on the ground.
explanationZh: 「輕輕地放下」用 place (放置)。throw 是丟,動作太粗暴。

storyBeat: 他蹲下來,慢慢地把手伸過來。
sentence: He moves his hand very ___ so I do not run away.
explanationZh: 怕嚇到小貓 → 溫柔地 (gently)。quickly 是快,反而會嚇到。

storyBeat: 吃飽了,小貓在他腳邊磨蹭。
sentence: I feel safe now. I begin to ___ him.
explanationZh: 吃飽 + 不害怕 → 開始 trust (信任) 他。fear 跟感覺相反。

storyBeat: 公園裡,一個綁馬尾的小女孩遠遠看著小貓。
sentence: A ___ girl with a ponytail watches me from far away.
explanationZh: 小女孩 → small。tall 是高,old 是老,都跟小不同。

storyBeat: 她拿出一小包貓零食。
sentence: She has a small bag of cat ___ in her hand.
explanationZh: 貓零食是 cat treats。toys 是玩具,情境不符。

storyBeat: 她蹲下來,慢慢靠近,怕嚇到小貓。
sentence: She walks very ___ because she does not want to scare me.
explanationZh: 怕嚇到 → 小心地 (carefully)。fast / loudly / wildly 都會嚇到動物。

storyBeat: 「你好,我叫美美。」她輕輕說。
sentence: "Hello, my ___ is Mei-mei," she says softly.
explanationZh: 自我介紹用 My name is... (我叫...)。age 是年齡,不會這樣介紹。

storyBeat: 她連續好幾天都來,終於敢摸摸小貓了。
sentence: She comes back every day. Now we are ___.
explanationZh: 天天見面 + 互相信任 = friends (朋友)。strangers 是陌生人,情境相反。

storyBeat: 她笑了,小貓也跟著喵了一聲。
sentence: Mei-mei ___ at me, and I feel happy too.
explanationZh: 她笑著看小貓 → smile (微笑)。cry 是哭,跟 happy 矛盾。

storyBeat: 夜晚的街角,一隻獨眼老狗布魯托走過來。
sentence: An old dog with ___ eye walks toward me at night.
explanationZh: 獨眼 = one eye (一隻眼睛)。three eyes 不符合動物常理。

storyBeat: 另一隻大狗想欺負小貓,布魯托擋在前面。
sentence: Brutus stands in front of me to ___ me.
explanationZh: 擋在前面 = protect (保護)。bite 是咬,跟「保護」相反。

storyBeat: 他帶小貓去找一個躲雨的地方。
sentence: Brutus shows me a ___ place to hide from the rain.
explanationZh: 躲雨的好地方 = safe (安全的)。dangerous (危險) 是反義詞。

storyBeat: 他把找到的一片麵包分一半給小貓。
sentence: He ___ his bread with me.
explanationZh: 分一半給對方 = share (分享)。hide 是藏起來,跟分享相反。

storyBeat: 他教小貓怎麼避開大車和惡狗。
sentence: Brutus teaches me how to stay away from ___.
explanationZh: 大車 + 惡狗 = danger (危險)。food / friends 顯然不是要躲的。

storyBeat: 現在小貓和布魯托一起走過街頭,不再害怕。
sentence: We walk through the street ___, like brothers.
explanationZh: 和布魯托「一起」走 = together。alone 是「獨自」,意思相反。

storyBeat: 美美帶爸媽到公園,把小貓介紹給他們。
sentence: Mei-mei wants me to be part of her ___.
explanationZh: 爸媽 + 小孩 + 寵物 = family (家人)。team / class 不包含寵物。

storyBeat: 媽媽蹲下來,輕輕摸小貓的頭。「我們帶你回家好嗎?」
sentence: "Would you like to come ___ with us?" the mother asks.
explanationZh: 領養 → come home (回家)。go to school / store 不是領養的講法。

storyBeat: 他們先帶小貓去看獸醫,做身體檢查。
sentence: They take me to the vet for a ___.
explanationZh: 獸醫那邊做的是 check-up (健康檢查)。party 是派對,情境不符。

storyBeat: 回家後,他們給小貓一個軟軟的小床。
sentence: They give me a ___ bed of my own.
explanationZh: 舒服的床 = soft (柔軟)。hard / wet / broken 都不舒服。

storyBeat: 小貓躺在床上,第一次覺得這麼安心。
sentence: I close my eyes. I feel ___ at last.
explanationZh: 在家裡的床上 → safe (安全)。scared / cold / alone 跟在新家的感覺相反。

storyBeat: 美美輕聲說:「歡迎回家。你永遠是我們的家人了。」
sentence: "Welcome home. You are our family ___."
explanationZh: 「永遠的家人」用 forever (永遠)。maybe (也許) 沒有承諾感。
